---
title: "02_OffspringSizeMortality"
author: "Nicholas K. Dulvy"
date: "2026-01-25"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r Final figure}
# =========================================================
# GLOBAL SETTINGS (edit knobs here)
# =========================================================
E <- 0.65
k <- 8.62e-5

T_set <- c(5, 15, 25)
mass_grid <- 10^seq(-3, 3, length.out = 300)

pred_mult <- c("Low predation" = 0.8,
               "Medium predation" = 1.0,
               "High predation" = 1.2)

# Keep only medium predation use TRUE, else FALSE
USE_SINGLE_SCENARIO <- TRUE
scenarios <- if (USE_SINGLE_SCENARIO) "Medium predation" else names(pred_mult)

# Cohort settings
N0 <- 1000
t_years <- seq(0, 10, by = 0.02)
N_floor <- 1
sizes <- c("Skate (100 g)" = 0.1,
           "Ray (1000 g)"  = 1.0)

# --- Publication font knobs ---
BASE_SIZE     <- 8
TITLE_SIZE    <- 12
SUBTITLE_SIZE <- 8
AXIS_TITLE    <- 8
AXIS_TEXT     <- 7
STRIP_TEXT    <- 8
LEG_TEXT      <- 7
LEG_TITLE     <- 8
LABEL_SIZE    <- 4.5  # geom_text size (ggplot units)
# --- Fixed cohort x-axis (time, years) ---
TIME_MIN    <- 0
TIME_MAX    <- 10
TIME_BREAKS <- seq(2, 10, by = 2)
TIME_MINOR  <- seq(1, 10, by = 1)

SIZE_LABELS <- c(
  "Skate" = expression(atop("Skate", "(100 g)")),
  "Ray"   = expression(atop("Ray", "(1000 g)"))
)

# --- Line width knobs (no dashed lines) ---
LW_COMPONENT <- c("Intrinsic (metabolic)" = 1.25,
                  "Predation"            = 1.25,
                  "Total"                = 1.5)

LW_SIZE <- c("Skate (100 g)" = 1.25,
             "Ray (1000 g)"  = 1.25)

# --- Colours (now by line type, not scenario) ---
COL_COMPONENT <- c("Intrinsic (metabolic)" = "#D95F02", #orange
                   "Predation"            = "#1B9E77", #teal
                   "Total"                = "#7F7F7F")  # grey

COL_SIZE <- c("Skate (100 g)" = "#1F78B4",
              "Ray (1000 g)"  = "#E31A1C")

TAG_SIZE <- 12

# STRIP_COLS <- c(
#   "5°C"  = "#6BAED6",   # blue
#   "15°C" = "#F768A1",   # pink
#   "25°C" = "#FB6A4A"    # red
# )

# --- Theme object (journal-ish) ---
theme_pub <- theme_classic(base_size = BASE_SIZE) +
  theme(
    plot.title        = element_text(size = TITLE_SIZE, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle     = element_blank(),   # <-- ADD THIS
    axis.title        = element_text(size = AXIS_TITLE),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = AXIS_TEXT),
    strip.text        = element_text(size = STRIP_TEXT, face = "bold"),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = LEG_TEXT),
    legend.key.height = grid::unit(3.0, "mm"),
    legend.key.width  = grid::unit(5.0, "mm"),
    # give the labels breathing room on the right
    plot.margin       = margin(4, 10, 4, 4),  # top, right, bottom, left (pt)
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = TAG_SIZE),
    # optional: nudge inward a bit
    plot.tag.position = c(0.02, 0.98)
  )

# --- Shared y-scale for cohort panels (C & D) ---
y_cohort_scale <- scale_y_log10(
  limits = c(1, 1000),          # adjust if needed
  breaks = c(1, 10, 100, 1000),
  minor_breaks = c(2, 5, 20, 50, 200, 500)
)
# =========================================================
# HELPERS
# =========================================================
cohort <- function(N0, mu_total, t) N0 * exp(-mu_total * t)

right_facet_level <- function(df) tail(levels(df$TempC), 1)

# anchor label x *inside* the panel (prevents falling off)
x_interior_log <- function(x_min, x_max, frac = 0.92) {
  10^(log10(x_min) + frac * (log10(x_max) - log10(x_min)))
}
x_interior_lin <- function(x_min, x_max, frac = 0.92) {
  x_min + frac * (x_max - x_min)
}

# =========================================================
# 1) INTRINSIC MORTALITY (metabolic): size + temperature dependent
# =========================================================
mu_metabolic_rel <- function(M_kg, T_C) {
  T_K <- T_C + 273.15
  M_kg^(-1/4) * exp(-E / (k * T_K))
}

# Calibrate: mu_metabolic(100 g, 15C) = 0.3 / yr
mu_target <- 0.3
alpha <- mu_target / mu_metabolic_rel(M_kg = 0.1, T_C = 15)
mu_metabolic <- function(M_kg, T_C) alpha * mu_metabolic_rel(M_kg, T_C)

# =========================================================
# 2A) PREDATION MODEL A: temperature-dependent (size-independent)
# =========================================================
E_pred <- 0.50
mu_predT_rel <- function(T_C) {
  T_K <- T_C + 273.15
  exp(-E_pred / (k * T_K))
}

mu_pred_ref_target <- 0.20
beta_T <- mu_pred_ref_target / mu_predT_rel(T_C = 15)

mu_pred_T <- function(T_C, scenario) {
  (beta_T * mu_predT_rel(T_C)) * pred_mult[scenario]
}

# =========================================================
# 2B) PREDATION MODEL B: size-dependent (higher in small)
# =========================================================
b_pred <- 0.35
M_ref  <- 0.1

mu_pred_M <- function(M_kg, scenario) {
  mu_pred_ref_target * pred_mult[scenario] * (M_kg / M_ref)^(-b_pred)
}

# =========================================================
# 3) Build mortality data frames (Scenario retained but may be single)
# =========================================================
build_mort_df_T <- function() {
  df <- bind_rows(lapply(T_set, function(TC) {
    bind_rows(lapply(scenarios, function(sc) {
      mu_i <- mu_metabolic(mass_grid, TC)
      mu_e <- rep(mu_pred_T(TC, sc), length(mass_grid))
      mu_t <- mu_i + mu_e

      bind_rows(
        data.frame(Mass = mass_grid, Mu = mu_i, TempC = paste0(TC, "°C"),
                   Scenario = sc, Component = "Intrinsic (metabolic)"),
        data.frame(Mass = mass_grid, Mu = mu_e, TempC = paste0(TC, "°C"),
                   Scenario = sc, Component = "Predation"),
        data.frame(Mass = mass_grid, Mu = mu_t, TempC = paste0(TC, "°C"),
                   Scenario = sc, Component = "Total")
      )
    }))
  }))

  df$TempC <- factor(df$TempC, levels = paste0(T_set, "°C"))
  df$Component <- factor(df$Component, levels = names(LW_COMPONENT))
  df
}

build_mort_df_M <- function() {
  df <- bind_rows(lapply(T_set, function(TC) {
    bind_rows(lapply(scenarios, function(sc) {
      mu_i <- mu_metabolic(mass_grid, TC)
      mu_e <- mu_pred_M(mass_grid, sc)
      mu_t <- mu_i + mu_e

      bind_rows(
        data.frame(Mass = mass_grid, Mu = mu_i, TempC = paste0(TC, "°C"),
                   Scenario = sc, Component = "Intrinsic (metabolic)"),
        data.frame(Mass = mass_grid, Mu = mu_e, TempC = paste0(TC, "°C"),
                   Scenario = sc, Component = "Predation"),
        data.frame(Mass = mass_grid, Mu = mu_t, TempC = paste0(TC, "°C"),
                   Scenario = sc, Component = "Total")
      )
    }))
  }))

  df$TempC <- factor(df$TempC, levels = paste0(T_set, "°C"))
  df$Component <- factor(df$Component, levels = names(LW_COMPONENT))
  df
}

df_mort_T <- build_mort_df_T()
df_mort_M <- build_mort_df_M()

# =========================================================
# 4) Build cohort data frames
# =========================================================
build_cohort_df_T <- function() {
  df <- bind_rows(lapply(T_set, function(TC) {
    bind_rows(lapply(scenarios, function(sc) {
      bind_rows(lapply(names(sizes), function(sz_lab) {
        M0 <- sizes[sz_lab]
        mu_tot <- mu_metabolic(M0, TC) + mu_pred_T(TC, sc)
        data.frame(
          t = t_years,
          N = ifelse(cohort(N0, mu_tot, t_years) < 1,
           NA,
           cohort(N0, mu_tot, t_years)),
          TempC = paste0(TC, "°C"),
          Scenario = sc,
          Size = sz_lab
        )
      }))
    }))
  }))

  df$TempC <- factor(df$TempC, levels = paste0(T_set, "°C"))
  df$Size  <- factor(df$Size, levels = names(LW_SIZE))
  df
}

build_cohort_df_M <- function() {
  df <- bind_rows(lapply(T_set, function(TC) {
    bind_rows(lapply(scenarios, function(sc) {
      bind_rows(lapply(names(sizes), function(sz_lab) {
        M0 <- sizes[sz_lab]
        mu_tot <- mu_metabolic(M0, TC) + mu_pred_M(M0, sc)
        data.frame(
          t = t_years,
          N = ifelse(cohort(N0, mu_tot, t_years) < 1,
           NA,
           cohort(N0, mu_tot, t_years)),
          TempC = paste0(TC, "°C"),
          Scenario = sc,
          Size = sz_lab
        )
      }))
    }))
  }))

  df$TempC <- factor(df$TempC, levels = paste0(T_set, "°C"))
  df$Size  <- factor(df$Size, levels = names(LW_SIZE))
  df
}

df_cohort_T <- build_cohort_df_T()
df_cohort_M <- build_cohort_df_M()

# =========================================================
# 5) LABEL NUDGE LOOKUP TABLE (THIS IS YOUR MAIN TWEAK POINT)
#    dy is multiplicative (good for log y-axes)
#    dx_add is additive in x-units (kg for mortality, years for cohort)
# =========================================================
label_nudges <- tibble::tribble(
  ~panel,     ~key,                    ~dx_add, ~dy,
  "mort_T",   "Intrinsic (metabolic)",   0.75,    0.75,
  "mort_T",   "Predation",              -330.5,  0.75,
  "mort_T",   "Total",                   300,     1.50,

  "mort_M",   "Intrinsic (metabolic)",   0,       0.75,
  "mort_M",   "Predation",              -150,    0.90,
  "mort_M",   "Total",                   0,       4.00,

  "cohort_T", "Skate (100 g)",          -4.9,       3.00,
  "cohort_T", "Ray (1000 g)",           0.0,       26.0,

  "cohort_M", "Skate (100 g)",          -3.5,   2.0,
  "cohort_M", "Ray (1000 g)",           0.0,     16.0
)

# =========================================================
# 6) Label data (ONLY right facet, ONLY one set of labels)
#    - Mortality: label Components (Intrinsic/Predation/Total)
#    - Cohort:    label Sizes (Skate/Ray) with stacked labels
# =========================================================

make_mort_labels <- function(df_mort, panel_name, x_frac = 0.92) {
  stopifnot(length(unique(df_mort$Scenario)) == 1)  # single scenario expected
  right <- right_facet_level(df_mort)

  x_lab <- x_interior_log(min(df_mort$Mass), max(df_mort$Mass), frac = x_frac)

  df_mort %>%
    filter(TempC == right) %>%
    group_by(TempC, Component) %>%
    summarise(
      x = x_lab,
      y = approx(x = Mass, y = Mu, xout = x_lab, rule = 2)$y,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    rename(key = Component) %>%   # <-- FIX: Component (not Size)
    left_join(label_nudges %>% filter(panel == panel_name), by = "key") %>%
    mutate(
      dx_add = dplyr::coalesce(dx_add, 0),
      dy     = dplyr::coalesce(dy, 1),
      x      = x + dx_add,
      y      = y * dy
    )
}

make_cohort_labels <- function(df_cohort, panel_name, t_frac = 0.92) {
  stopifnot(length(unique(df_cohort$Scenario)) == 1)
  right <- right_facet_level(df_cohort)

  t_lab <- x_interior_lin(min(df_cohort$t), max(df_cohort$t), frac = t_frac)

  df_cohort %>%
    filter(TempC == right) %>%
    group_by(TempC, Size) %>%
    summarise(
      x = t_lab,
      y = approx(x = t, y = N, xout = t_lab, rule = 2)$y,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    rename(key = Size) %>%
    left_join(label_nudges %>% filter(panel == panel_name), by = "key") %>%
    mutate(
      dx_add = dplyr::coalesce(dx_add, 0),
      dy     = dplyr::coalesce(dy, 1),
      x      = x + dx_add,
      y      = y * dy,

      # plotmath stacked labels (ONLY for cohort sizes)
      key_plot = dplyr::case_when(
        key == "Skate (100 g)" ~ "atop('Skate','(100 g)')",
        key == "Ray (1000 g)"  ~ "atop('Ray','(1000 g)')",
        TRUE                   ~ key
      )
    )
}

# Filter once to single scenario (keeps everything consistent)
df_mort_T1   <- df_mort_T   %>% dplyr::filter(Scenario == scenarios[1])
df_mort_M1   <- df_mort_M   %>% dplyr::filter(Scenario == scenarios[1])
df_cohort_T1 <- df_cohort_T %>% dplyr::filter(Scenario == scenarios[1])
df_cohort_M1 <- df_cohort_M %>% dplyr::filter(Scenario == scenarios[1])

# Build label data
lab_mort_T   <- make_mort_labels(df_mort_T1, "mort_T")
lab_mort_M   <- make_mort_labels(df_mort_M1, "mort_M")
lab_cohort_T <- make_cohort_labels(df_cohort_T1, "cohort_T")
lab_cohort_M <- make_cohort_labels(df_cohort_M1, "cohort_M")
# =========================================================
# 7) PLOTS
#    - Mortality: colour = Component, linewidth = Component
#    - Cohort:    colour = Size,      linewidth = Size
#    - Labels: placed INSIDE panel with hjust = 1 (prevents clipping)
# =========================================================
p_mort_T <- ggplot(df_mort_T1,
                   aes(Mass, Mu,
                       group = Component,
                       colour = Component,
                       linewidth = Component)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = COL_COMPONENT) +
  scale_linewidth_manual(values = LW_COMPONENT) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  facet_wrap(~ TempC, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "Body mass (kg)",
    y = expression("Mortality rate " * mu * " (per year, log"[10] * " scale)"),
    title = "Temp-dependent predation (size-independent)",
    subtitle = "Line colour/width = intrinsic, predation, total"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = lab_mort_T,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = key, colour = key),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 1,           # anchor text INSIDE at x
    size  = LABEL_SIZE
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_pub

p_mort_M <- ggplot(df_mort_M1,
                   aes(Mass, Mu,
                       group = Component,
                       colour = Component,
                       linewidth = Component)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = COL_COMPONENT) +
  scale_linewidth_manual(values = LW_COMPONENT) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  facet_wrap(~ TempC, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "Body mass (kg)",
    y = expression("Mortality rate " * mu * " (per year, log"[10] * " scale)"),
    title = "Size-dependent predation",
    subtitle = "Line colour/width = intrinsic, predation, total"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = lab_mort_M,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = key, colour = key),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 1,
    size  = LABEL_SIZE
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_pub

p_cohort_T <- ggplot(df_cohort_T1,
                     aes(t, N,
                         group = Size,
                         colour = Size,
                         linewidth = Size)) +
  geom_line(na.rm = TRUE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = COL_SIZE) +
  scale_linewidth_manual(values = LW_SIZE) +

  ## ---- FIXED TIME AXIS ----
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(TIME_MIN, TIME_MAX),
    breaks = TIME_BREAKS,
    minor_breaks = TIME_MINOR,
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +

  scale_y_log10() +
  facet_wrap(~ TempC, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "Time (years)",
    y = "Cohort size N(t)",
    title = "Cohort survival: metabolic + temp-dependent predation",
    subtitle = "Line colour/width = offspring size"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = lab_cohort_T,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = key_plot, colour = key),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 1,
    size  = LABEL_SIZE,
    parse = TRUE
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_pub

p_cohort_M <- ggplot(df_cohort_M1,
                     aes(t, N,
                         group = Size,
                         colour = Size,
                         linewidth = Size)) +
  geom_line(na.rm = TRUE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = COL_SIZE) +
  scale_linewidth_manual(values = LW_SIZE) +

  ## ---- FIXED TIME AXIS ----
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(TIME_MIN, TIME_MAX),
    breaks = TIME_BREAKS,
    minor_breaks = TIME_MINOR,
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +

  scale_y_log10() +
  facet_wrap(~ TempC, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "Time (years)",
    y = "Cohort size N(t)",
    title = "Cohort survival: metabolic + size-dependent predation",
    subtitle = "Line colour/width = offspring size"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = lab_cohort_M,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = key_plot, colour = key),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 1,
    size  = LABEL_SIZE,
    parse = TRUE
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_pub

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 8) Assemble (NO theme inside plot_annotation)
# ---------------------------------------------------------

SHOW_LEGEND <- FALSE
LEG_POS <- if (SHOW_LEGEND) "bottom" else "none"

p_mort_T   <- p_mort_T   + theme(legend.position = LEG_POS)
p_mort_M   <- p_mort_M   + theme(legend.position = LEG_POS)
p_cohort_T <- p_cohort_T + theme(legend.position = LEG_POS)
p_cohort_M <- p_cohort_M + theme(legend.position = LEG_POS)

p_2x2 <- (p_mort_T | p_mort_M) /
         (p_cohort_T | p_cohort_M) +
  patchwork::plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a")


p_2x2

# =========================================================
# 9) Save
# =========================================================
ggsave("figures/metabolic_predation_260125.pdf",
       plot = p_2x2, width = 14, height = 9, device = cairo_pdf)

# Save high-resolution PNG (journal + presentations)
ggsave(
  "figures/metabolic_predation_260125.png",
  plot   = p_2x2,
  width  = 14,
  height = 9,
  units  = "in",
  dpi    = 600,
  bg     = "white"
)
```
